title: Paul Anthony Pro Series 2 Mens USB Cordless Foil Shaver/Recharge by Any USB Power Source/Twin Blades for Closer Shave/Cordless Operation/Retractable Precision Trimmer - Black/Metal - H5020
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: THE PERFECT TRAVEL COMPANION FOR WORLDWIDE USE: Fully rechargeable by any USB power source. Simply Insert the USB charging cable into the bottom of the shaver and then insert the connection into any suitable USB charging device. Approximate 35 minute operation on a full charge.

TWIN TITANIUM FLOATING BLADES: The blades oscillate rapidly to cut away at facial hair, giving a clean, smooth shave whilst the foil head protects the skin. Cleaning brush included to prolong the life of the blades and foil head.
RETRACTABLE SIDE PRECISION TRIMMER: Trim and style styling with a built-in trimmer for sideburns, moustache and beards that can be released when needed.
LED POWER & CHARGING INDICATOR: There is an LED light on this device which indicates when there is power to the shaver and is charging.

EASY MAINTENANCE & CARE: This appliance has been designed to operate over a long period of time with minimum maintenance. This shaver comes with removable components, and a cleaning tool, allowing for a more thorough and detailed clean. However there is a free spare blade and foil included should you ever need to replace them.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony Pro Series 2 Mens USB Cordless Foil Shaver is the perfect travel companion for worldwide use, fully rechargeable at any USB power source. This shaver has twin titanium floating blades that oscillate rapidly to cut away at facial hair, giving you a clean, smooth shave and a steel foil flexible head that protects the skin.With each charge the operation time is approx. 35 minutes, meaning you won't get interrupted by the device running out of charge during use. The LED light will help to indicate when the device is powered on and charging.This appliance is an all round helper, with a built-in precision trimmer that can be easily released with the push of a button, you are able to also precisely trim and style sideburns, moustache and beards. A cleaning brush is also included to help maintain the appliance by easily removing the head cover. Free spare blade and foil included should you ever need to replace them and your purchase is also covered by a 2 year guarantee for your peace of mind. Box Includes:1x Paul Anthony Pro Series 2 Mens USB Cordless Foil Shaver 1x Cleaning Brush1x USB Charging Cable1x Instruction Manual1x Spare Foil and Blade Safety Warning Potential safety warnings may include: 'Do not use near water', 'Ensure the device is unplugged when not in use', 'Be careful not to cut yourself while shaving or cleaning the blades', 'Ensure the device is properly charged before use to avoid risk of electrical shock', and 'Clean the device regularly to prevent bacterial growth'.
